message:
chore(deps): bump bytes 1.10.1 → 1.11.1

Pure patch/minor bump (`[workspace.dependencies]` floor in root
Cargo.toml). Cargo.lock already resolved to 1.11.1 via transitive
dependencies, so no lock-file change.

Verification:
- `rch exec -- cargo check --workspace --all-targets` → OK
- `rch exec -- cargo test -p fp-io --lib` → 192 passed, 0 failed
  (fp-io is the only workspace crate that uses `bytes::` directly)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
